title: Functional Knight
description: Let you summon an actual knight that attacks with the use of only resource pack by changing the wolf model and texture to a knight
body:
Functional Knight - Change wolf model to knight using name based.
1.21.4 NOW AVAILABLE

Requires Optifine or EMF fabric

INSTRUCTIONS:

.

**step 1**
Grab yourself some Nametag, and rename it **_"Knight"_** (Case Sensitive)

**Step 2**
Find a Wolf and use the tag

**Step 3**
Tame it and it will equip a sword

**Step 4**
Give it some armor and it will have a shield
_______________________________________________________________

If you want to hide the name, then do Team Command.

/team add <team_name>

/team modify <team_name> nametagVisibility never

/team join <team_name> @e[name=Knight]

/team join <team_name> @s

.

.

ps : dont think about trying to breed them
